title: phalangium altissimum
intro: Phalangium altissimum, also known as Phalangium, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the genus Phalangium in the family Apiaceae. It is a perennial herb that is native to Europe, Asia, and North Africa, and is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which help to relieve respiratory issues, reduce pain and inflammation, and support the immune system. Phalangium altissimum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used to treat conditions such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds.
